headline: RVMD Reports Wider-Than-Expected Loss in Q1, Raises '26 Expense View
summary: Revolution Medicines posts a wider Q1 loss and raises its 2026 expense outlook as R&D and commercial prep costs climb.

headline: IgG4-Related Disease Market Analysis and Forecasts, 2025-2026 & 2035 with Amgen, Zenas BioPharma, Bristol Myers Squibb, and Sanofi Leading
summary: Global IgG4-related disease market sees growth due to increased research funding and development of targeted therapies. This rare autoimmune condition results in inflammation and organ dysfunction. Emerging biologic treatments aim to improve efficacy and safety over traditional corticosteroids. Key players like Amgen and Sanofi are innovating with strategic investments and market expansion, despite challenges posed by costs and limited treatment options.
